text: In terms of Theory for General Software Architecture this Course is a good refresher for a person who is working with Software Architecture already . The Course could have more focused on IoT specific scenarios compared to Generic Software Architecture . What i recommend is to change the course title and have a separate one for IoT specific matters . If the presenters can provide more practical examples that will help remember how and where we can apply these scenarios . Overall this course content is good and interesting to watch .
